snippets.description:
BatchCreateResourceValueConfigs creates a ResourceValueConfig for an organization. Maps user's tags to
difference resource values for use by the attack path simulation.
snippets.title: securitycenter BatchCreateResourceValueConfigs Sample

snippets.description:
BulkMuteFindings kicks off an LRO to bulk mute findings for a parent based on a filter. If
no location is specified, findings are muted in global. The parent
can be either an organization, folder, or project. The findings matched by
the filter will be muted after the LRO is done.
snippets.title: securitycenter BulkMuteFindings Sample

snippets.description: CancelOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: securitycenter CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description: CreateBigQueryExport creates a BigQuery export.

snippets.description:
GroupFindings filters an organization or source's findings and groups them by their
specified properties in a location. If no location is specified, findings
are assumed to be in global

To group across all sources provide a `-` as the source id.
The following list shows some examples: 

+ `/v2/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings`
+
`/v2/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/locations/{location_id}/findings`
+ `/v2/folders/{folder_id}/sources/-/findings`
+ `/v2/folders/{folder_id}/sources/-/locations/{location_id}/findings`
+ `/v2/projects/{project_id}/sources/-/findings`
+ `/v2/projects/{project_id}/sources/-/locations/{location_id}/findings`
snippets.title: securitycenter GroupFindings Sample

snippets.description:
ListAttackPaths lists the attack paths for a set of simulation results or valued resources
and filter.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListAttackPaths Sample

snippets.description:
ListBigQueryExports lists BigQuery exports. Note that when requesting BigQuery exports at a
given level all exports under that level are also returned e.g. if
requesting BigQuery exports under a folder, then all BigQuery exports
immediately under the folder plus the ones created under the projects
within the folder are returned.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListBigQueryExports Sample

snippets.description:
ListFindings lists an organization or source's findings.

To list across all sources for a given location provide a `-` as the source
id. If no location is specified, finding are assumed to be in global.
The following list shows some examples: 

+ `/v2/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings`
+
`/v2/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/locations/{location_id}/findings`
snippets.title: securitycenter ListFindings Sample

snippets.description:
ListMuteConfigs lists mute configs. If no location is specified, default is
global.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListMuteConfigs Sample

snippets.description: ListNotificationConfigs lists notification configs.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListNotificationConfigs Sample

SetFindingState updates the state of a finding. If no location is specified, finding is
assumed to be in global

SetMute updates the mute state of a finding. If no location is specified, finding
is assumed to be in global

snippets.description:
UpdateExternalSystem updates external system. This is for a given finding. If no location is
specified, finding is assumed to be in global
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateExternalSystem Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateFinding creates or updates a finding. If no location is specified, finding is
assumed to be in global. The corresponding source must exist for a finding
creation to succeed.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateFinding Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateMuteConfig updates a mute config. If no location is specified, default is
global.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateMuteConfig Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateNotificationConfig updates a notification config. The following update
fields are allowed: description, pubsub_topic, streaming_config.filter
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateNotificationConfig Sample

snippets.description: UpdateResourceValueConfig updates an existing ResourceValueConfigs with new rules.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateResourceValueConfig Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSecurityMarks updates security marks. For Finding Security marks, if no location is
specified, finding is assumed to be in global. Assets Security Marks can
only be accessed through global endpoint.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateSecurityMarks Sample

snippets.description: UpdateSource updates a source.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateSource Sample
